description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Aligned Delegates are eligible to receive budgets through this funding process. This constitutes an exception to [A.1.4.5 - ACs Can Be Operationally Active In Only One Role At A Time](9b1d1c2f-ace0-4637-8050-4711ae9f9a8c), which generally prohibits ACs from simultaneously assuming multiple ecosystem roles.
